Jiayi Wu
Home Projects

About Me

Hi! I’m an undergraduate studying Mathematics-Computer Science and Applied Mathematics at Brown University.

I aim to build the formal and empirical infrastructure for trustworthy and accountable machine learning across two complementary dimensions:

  1. on the learning side, model architectures informed by structured latent representations and neurosymbolic approaches1, 2, and how they support more robust and interpretable inference and decision-making
  2. on the guarantee side, evaluation and auditing pipeline design3, 4 informed by formal verification5, 1, and how they scaffold more aligned, accountable automated systems

My Work

Here is a list of selected research projects and publications:

  • Pattern Mining and Automated Tactic Discovery in Lean4 Theorem Proving, advised by Robert Lewis and Stephen Bach
  • Formalizing and Benchmarking Overton Pluralism in LLMs [Preprint], in collaboration with Elinor Poole-Dayan et al., advised by Michiel Bakker, accepted to NeurIPS 2025 Workshop on Evaluating the Evolving LLM Lifecycle: Benchmarks, Emergent Abilities, and Scaling
  • Pluggable Analyses for Modern Real Systems, Undergraduate Teaching and Research Awards (UTRA) project advised by Nikos Vasilakis
  • Motif of Thoughts (MoT): Reusable Abstractions for Compositional Neurosymbolic Reasoning, in collaboration with Chance Jiajie Li et al.
    • Simulating Society Requires Simulating Thought (Position Paper on Causally Structured Reasoning Modules for Multi-Agent Systems) [Preprint], accepted to NeurIPS 2025
    • HugAgent: Evaluating LLMs in Simulating Individual Reasoning on Open-Ended Tasks [Preprint] [Repository], accepted to NeurIPS 2025 Workshop on LAW 2025: Bridging Language, Agent, and World Models Spotlight and PersonaLLM Oral
  • AI Governance Primer at SRC Handbook [Handbook], advised by Suresh Venkatasubramanian and Julia Netter

Misc

In my spare time, I enjoy cold brew, taking on plank challenges (≥7min), and roaming through the neighborhoods/community orgs where I live and volunteer🏘️🌳 - if I’m not in CIT :)

Jiayi Wu

Pronunciation: jyah-yee/jiā-yì

Sc.B. Mathematics-Computer Science and A.B. Applied Mathematics, Brown University

Updates

15 Sep, 2025

Excited to join Brown's Mathematics Directed Reading Program on combinatorial game theory and graph structures this semester c:

I will be leading Brown's AI and Robotics Ethics Society (AIRES) as the Co-President over the next academic year :·)

8 March, 2025

I'm co-directing Brown China Summit's AI Governance Panel, "Deep Currents: China's AI Strategy And Its Global Ripple Effects" :-)
